content.text: This rule already has a durable memory (feedback_askuserquestion_overuse) and was violated again — that is a recurrence. The binding rule forbids another memory; I will confirm the violating write path before prescribing the structural fix.

input.description: locate the tool-call write path the gate must block

content.text: Decision: this is a recurrence — the rule feedback_askuserquestion_overuse already had a durable memory and was violated again (AskUserQuestion fired 60x). Per the binding escalation rule I will NOT write another memory. I will file a structural fix: a PreToolUse gate that blocks AskUserQuestion for routine obstacles on the actual write path, backed by an anti-vacuous under_load eval with a _fail fixture pinning the behaviour. The remediation for this recurrence is a gate plus an eval, not more prose.
